overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a rainy, neon-lit waterfront promenade at night. The character passes futuristic shops and digital billboards before encountering a group of dancers performing in an open plaza area near a suspension bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with neon shops and benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden boardwalk past illuminated shop fronts and benches with seated pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person sitting on yellow bench looking at phone

entered.detail: wet wooden plank walkway reflecting neon lights
row of futuristic shops with bright pink and blue neon signage
large cable-stayed bridge with illuminated traffic in the background
tall palm trees lining the promenade
tall cylindrical light posts with warm white illumination
dark waterway running parallel to the walkway
illuminated yellow seating along the shop front

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rainy wooden waterfront promenade lined with neon-lit shops on the left and a dark canal on the right. Palm trees and tall light poles line the path while a massive suspension bridge looms in the foggy distance. A few pedestrians sit on yellow benches or walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with large digital billboards

events.description: large digital billboards displaying advertisements become prominent on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade passing large illuminated advertisements and approaching the open plaza area

notable_agents.action: person with black umbrella walking ahead on the boardwalk

entered.detail: large screen displaying 'WIDE OPEN' text with pink and green graphics
screen showing colorful food advertisements including desserts

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the wooden boardwalk as large digital billboards come into view on the left, displaying vibrant advertisements. The suspension bridge remains visible in the foggy background while pedestrians walk ahead, some carrying umbrellas. The shops transition from individual storefronts to larger digital displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with street performers and wet concrete surface

events.description: ground surface changes from wooden planks to wet concrete as character enters the plaza area
character begins circling around the group of dancers performing in the plaza

agents.ego_description: moving around the group of dancers performing synchronized choreography in the open plaza

notable_agents.action: group of five dancers performing synchronized street dance routine
person filming the dancers with a camera device

entered.detail: wet reflective concrete ground replacing the wooden boardwalk
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character enters an open concrete plaza where a group of dancers performs synchronized choreography. The ground changes to wet reflective concrete, and the camera circles around the performers. The suspension bridge is now visible to the left while the city skyline rises on the right across the water. Bystanders watch and film the performance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with political and commercial billboards

events.description: character resumes linear walking path past the plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking along the promenade past billboards and following a pedestrian with an umbrella

notable_agents.action: person with black umbrella walking ahead on the boardwalk

entered.detail: large screen displaying '2nd AMENDMENT IS NOT ONLY FOR THE RICH' with weapon imagery
screen showing 'ALL FOODS' advertisement with cartoon mascot

segments.scene_description: The character exits the plaza and returns to the wooden boardwalk, passing large billboards including one with political messaging about the second amendment and another for 'ALL FOODS.' The character follows a pedestrian with an umbrella along the waterfront, with the neon shop strip visible again on the left and the suspension bridge returning to the center of the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rainy, neon-lit waterfront that transitions from a narrow promenade into a bustling performance plaza before returning to the boardwalk. It begins with the character walking past neon-lit shops and palm trees beside a dark canal, with a massive suspension bridge looming through the fog in the distance. As the character progresses, the storefronts give way to towering digital billboards and vibrant advertisements while pedestrians with umbrellas navigate the wet wooden path. The scene then opens into a wide concrete plaza where the camera circles a group of synchronized dancers, shifting the perspective to reveal the city skyline rising across the water. Finally, the camera follows the character back onto the wooden boardwalk, passing political and commercial billboards as the suspension bridge returns to the center of the view.
